projectName: ZK-Intent Router: Privacy-Preserving Cross-Chain Agent Execution
hackathon: AI Trading Agents ERC-8004 | lablab.ai | $55,000 SURGE token | deadline April 12 2026
description: Build an ERC-8004 compliant Agent that executes cross-chain trades via a ZK-Verified Intent Router. Unlike AutoTradeX which executes trades, this agent submits 'Intent' transactions that are fulfilled by a decentralized network of solvers. The core innovation is the ZK circuit that proves the solver fulfilled the user's intent (e.g., 'Get at least X amount of Token B for Token A') without revealing the specific path or price impact. This prevents front-running and preserves strategy IP. The syst
angle: First implementation of Zero-Knowledge Intent Routing that proves trade execution optimality without revealing the strategy, route, or MEV opportunity to the public mempool.
